title: Hex SBM
description: A radial menu for navigating Hexcasting spellbook pages. Inspired by Hex Gloop.
body:
# HexSBM

Adds a radial menu for navigating pages in the Hexcasting spellbook.

Instead of scrolling through up to 64 pages with a mouse wheel, you get a clean circular interface:  
- **Inner ring**: 8 page groups  
- **Outer ring**: 8 pages per group (64 total)  
- Select any page with a **single click**  
- **Optional icons**: assign custom icons to pages **or groups** for quick visual recognition  

## Controls
- Hold the spellbook in your **off-hand** and press **V** to open the menu  
- **Left-click** on a page to confirm selection  
- **Right-click** on a page **or a group (inner ring)** to assign the currently selected hotbar item as its icon  
- **Scroll the mouse wheel** while the menu is open to change hotbar slots (requires the spellbook to be in your off-hand)  
- Press **Esc** to close
- Open configuration panel by moving your cursor to the right side of the screen while in radial menu


## Requirements
- [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting)
## Localization
- Special thanks to [ChuijkYahus](https://github.com/ChuijkYahus) for the Chinese localization
- Special thanks to [Gotyx](https://modrinth.com/user/Gotyx) for the English localization

---
Found a bug or UI feels unintuitive? **Please tell me.**  
I’m open to suggestions, complaints, and feature requests — don’t just uninstall and forget. If something bothers you, there’s a good chance it can be fixed or improved.  
- Report issues on [GitHub](https://github.com/Soorsh/HexSBM/issues) 
- Or DM me on Discord (if I’ve fallen into an eternal sleep).

> Works on both client and server.
